I feel like I’m seeing elements of numerous horror shorts from over the years. Twilight Zone’s “Something in the Walls” (1989); Evan Sweet’s brilliant “Hide: Bloody Mary” (2016); various “Smiling Woman/Man” etc. shorts... Of course the creepy-smile motif in film goes all the way back to the silent era, but I’m wondering if there are more recent specific influences / references here.
